title: Danger Zone
writer: Herb Margolis, Lou Morheim, Julian Harmon
actors: Hugh Beaumont, Edward Brophy, Richard Travis
plot: Claire Underwood hires San Francisco private-detective Dennis O'Brien to purchase a saxophone case at an auction, and O'Brien is promptly slugged and the case is stolen by Larry Dunlap. O'Brien snoops around and learns that Claire...
